title: Sonīpat Heat Wave
lead: Sonīpat is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.20. Temperatures are severely elevated, posing significant risks.
body:
The current heat wave in Sonīpat has reached a critical level, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 13.7 GG, indicating extremely high temperatures. 
 Humidity is at 39% and wind speed is 7.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
